# Divine Travel Nest Safaris

> Expert-guided, tailor-made East Africa safari holidays — Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda & Rwanda. Budget to luxury. Woman-led. Nairobi-based.

Divine Travel Nest Safaris Ltd is a Kenya-based, woman-led safari company founded to connect travellers with the soul of the African wild. We plan and operate bespoke safari tours across Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda and Rwanda — from budget camping safaris to luxury tented-camp experiences — with a personal planner from first inquiry to airport drop-off.

## What We Do

- **Kenya safaris** — Masai Mara, Amboseli, Tsavo, Samburu, Ol Pejeta, Lake Nakuru and more
- **Tanzania safaris** — Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire, Selous, Ruaha
- **Uganda safaris** — Bwindi gorilla trekking, Queen Elizabeth NP, Murchison Falls
- **Rwanda safaris** — Volcanoes NP gorilla trekking, Nyungwe chimpanzee tracking, Akagera Big Five
- **Cross-country circuits** — combined Kenya–Tanzania, Kenya–Uganda, Rwanda, or multi-country itineraries
- **Tailor-made itineraries** — every package is custom-built to the client's dates, budget and interests

## Key Facts

- Location: Nairobi, Kenya (serving all of East Africa)
- Contact: info@divinetravelnestsafaris.com | +254 722-595-916 | WhatsApp available
- Certifications: Kenya Professional Safari Guides Association (KPSGA), Eco-Tourism Kenya, Licensed Tour Operator
- TripAdvisor: reviewed and listed
- Price tiers: Budget, Mid-Range, Luxury
- Languages: English
- Response time: within 24 hours for all enquiries

## Site Structure

- [Home](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/) — overview, featured safaris, testimonials, Great Migration calendar
- [All Safaris](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/safaris) — full filterable catalogue
- [Kenya Safaris](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/safaris/kenya) — Kenya safari packages
- [Tanzania Safaris](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/safaris/tanzania) — Tanzania safari packages
- [Uganda Safaris](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/safaris/uganda) — Uganda safari & gorilla trekking packages
- [Rwanda Safaris](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/safaris/rwanda) — Rwanda gorilla trekking & cultural safari packages
- [Cross-Country Safaris](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/safaris/cross-country-safaris) — multi-country circuits
- [Destinations: Kenya](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/destinations/kenya) — park-by-park guide to Kenya wildlife areas
- [Destinations: Tanzania](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/destinations/tanzania) — park-by-park guide to Tanzania wildlife areas
- [Destinations: Uganda](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/destinations/uganda) — park-by-park guide to Uganda wildlife areas
- [Destinations: Rwanda](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/destinations/rwanda) — park-by-park guide to Rwanda wildlife areas
- [Safari Types](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/safari-types) — every safari style compared, by activity (walking, photographic, water-based, night, birding, game-drive, fly-in, mobile-camping, horseback, balloon, self-drive, conservation, wellness) and by traveller (family, honeymoon, couples, solo, small-group, private)
- [Plan My Safari](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/plan-my-safari) — free custom itinerary request form
- [Book Your Safari](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/bookings) — pick a package and request a booking online
- [Field Journal (Blog)](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/journal) — safari planning guides, wildlife reports, destination deep-dives
- [About Us](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/about) — company story, team, values, certifications
- [Contact](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/contact) — enquiry form, office details, planning process
- [Community Guidelines](https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/guidelines) — responsible travel expectations for wildlife, communities and fellow travellers

## Safari Planning FAQs

**When is the best time for the Great Migration?**
The Mara River crossings (most dramatic moment) happen July–October in Kenya's Masai Mara. Calving season is January–February in the southern Serengeti, Tanzania.

**How far in advance should gorilla trekking permits be booked?**
At least 6 months ahead; 12 months for peak season (July–September, December–January). We handle all permit applications.

**What is included in a safari package?**
Park fees, all listed game drives, accommodation, full board (breakfast/lunch/dinner), airport and inter-park transfers, and an English-speaking licensed guide. International flights, travel insurance and personal gratuities are not included.

**What price tiers do you offer?**
Budget (shared minibus, tented camps), Mid-Range (private vehicle, en-suite lodges) and Luxury (exclusive-use vehicles, world-class tented camps or lodges).

**Do you handle family safaris?**
Yes — family safaris are a specialty. We select family-friendly lodges and child-friendly guides. Gorilla trekking has a minimum age of 15.

**What types of safari do you offer?**
Two dimensions: activity (walking, photographic, water-based, night, birding, game-drive, fly-in, mobile-camping, horseback, balloon, self-drive, conservation, wellness) and traveller (family, honeymoon, couples, solo, small-group, private). Most itineraries combine one of each — see /safari-types for details.
